reason: Run the tsgo typecheck from the opencode package

command: cd packages/opencode && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | head -500
reason: Get the complete typecheck output, first 500 lines

command: cd packages/opencode && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | grep -E 'TS2554|TS2339|TS2322|TS18046|error TS' | sort -t: -k1,1 -k2,2n
reason: Extract all type errors, sorted by file and line

command: cd packages/opencode && bun run typecheck 2>&1 > /tmp/tsgo-full-output.txt && echo "Lines: $(wc -l < /tmp/tsgo-full-output.txt)"
reason: Save full typecheck output and get line count

command: cd packages/opencode && bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | tee /tmp/tsgo.log | wc -l
reason: Run typecheck, tee to file and count lines

command: cd packages/opencode && bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS'
cd packages/opencode && bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E 'TS2554' || echo "NO TS2554 ERRORS"
cd packages/opencode && bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E 'TS2339' || echo "NO TS2339 ERRORS"
cd packages/opencode && bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E 'TS2322' || echo "NO TS2322 ERRORS"
cd packages/opencode && bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E 'TS18046' || echo "NO TS18046 ERRORS"
cd packages/opencode && bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E 'error TS[0-9]' | grep -v -E 'TS7006|TS2307|TS2554|TS2339|TS2322|TS18046' | sort -t: -k3 -t' ' -k3 | uniq -c | sort -rn
reason: Count and categorize all other (misc) error codes

command: cd packages/opencode && bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -oP 'TS[0-9]+' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
reason: Count all unique TS error codes with counts

command: cd packages/opencode && bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -o 'TS[0-9]*' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
reason: Count all unique TS error codes

command: cd packages/opencode && bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E 'error TS7031|error TS7024|error TS7022|error TS7019|error TS2769|error TS2719'
cd packages/opencode && bunx tsgo --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS'
